basic_details.short_information: Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF) Commandant (Architect) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CRPF. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CRPF Commandant (Architect) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Architecture from a recognized University or Institution and registered with Council of Architecture under the Architecture Act, 1972 (20 of 1972), Ten years experience in execution of Architecture work, Holding analogous posts on regular basis or five years regular service in level 12 or ten years regular service in level 11 in the pay matrix
qualification.details: Commandant (Architect): Holding analogous posts on regular basis or 5 years regular service in level 12 (Rs. 78,800-2,09,200) or 10 years regular service in level 11 (Rs. 67,700-2,08,700) and possessing degree in Architecture from a recognized University or Institution registered with Council of Architecture under Architecture Act 1972 and having 10 years experience in execution of Architecture work.

content_sections.heading: CRPF Commandant (Architect) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CRPF Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CRPF Commandant (Architect) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Commandant (Architect): Holding analogous posts on regular basis or 5 years regular service in level 12 (Rs. 78,800-2,09,200) or 10 years regular service in level 11 (Rs. 67,700-2,08,700) and possessing degree in Architecture from a recognized University or Institution registered with Council of Architecture under Architecture Act 1972 and having 10 years experience in execution of Architecture work.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CRPF Commandant (Architect) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CRPF Commandant (Architect) recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Commandant (Architect) post is scheduled for 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Commandant (Architect) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Commandant (Architect) position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 85,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Commandant (Architect) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Architecture from a recognized university and be registered with the Council of Architecture. Additionally, ten years of experience in architectural work is required.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Commandant (Architect) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Commandant (Architect) post is 52 years.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Commandant (Architect) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Commandant (Architect) position in the Central Reserve Police Force.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by a Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this CRPF recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in New Delhi, Delhi. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.
